patternRules.message: Generated spec appears to assert against obfuscated runtime export names.
Generated spec appears to depend on temporary debug globals or injected window state.
Generated spec should use kuiklyPage.goto() instead of raw page.goto query construction.
Generated spec asserts only actionCount > 0 with no stable post-action oracle. Add a toBeVisible or toHaveText assertion after the interaction.
Generated spec calls runRuleDrivenInteractions but has no subsequent expect() after the action count check. At least one stable post-action assertion is required.
